hero.headline: Global Exporters of Premium Agricultural Products
hero.subheadline: Delivering nature's finest from farm to world — quality assured, globally compliant, reliably supplied.

about_preview.para1: TWAM GLOBAL is a premier agricultural export company committed to delivering the finest Indian produce to international markets. With deep-rooted expertise and a relentless focus on quality, we bridge farmers and global buyers with trust and precision.
about_preview.para2: Our rigorous quality control, compliance with international standards, and strong logistics network make us the preferred sourcing partner for importers across 50+ countries.

why_us.heading: Excellence at Every Step of the Journey

cards.title: Uncompromised Quality
cards.desc: Every shipment undergoes rigorous multi-stage quality inspection — from farm sourcing to final loading — ensuring international-grade standards are consistently met.

cards.title: Direct Farm Sourcing
cards.desc: We partner directly with trusted farmers across India's prime agricultural belts, ensuring traceability, freshness, and fair-trade practices at the source.

cards.title: Export-Grade Packaging
cards.desc: Our packaging solutions are tailored for international shipping — moisture-proof, tamper-evident, and compliant with destination country regulations.

cards.title: Global Reach
cards.desc: Established supply chains to 50+ countries across Asia, Europe, Middle East, and Africa — with experienced logistics coordination and on-time delivery records.

cards.title: Certifications & Compliance
cards.desc: Fully certified with APEDA, FSSAI, ISO, and Phytosanitary standards. We handle all documentation, ensuring smooth customs clearance at every destination port.

cards.title: Dedicated Account Support
cards.desc: Each client gets a dedicated relationship manager — ensuring prompt communication, custom pricing, flexible MOQ, and personalised end-to-end service.

cta.heading: Ready to Source Premium Indian Products?
cta.subtext: Get in touch with our export team for custom pricing, samples, and shipping quotes tailored to your requirements.
